overall.description: Game engine footage depicting a first-person perspective from a naval vessel's bridge at night. The ship sails through stormy waters as lightning briefly illuminates the ocean surface, with navigation monitors displaying radar and chart data.

agents.ego_description: piloting the vessel through dark waters while monitoring the navigation displays

entered.detail: three-screen display array showing radar, chart, and depth data
triangular forecastle structure with navigation lights
metal safety railings along the deck perimeter

segments.scene_description: The view from the ship's bridge shows navigation monitors overhead and the vessel's bow extending into darkness. The ship moves steadily forward through the night with only the artificial display illumination and running lights visible.

events.description: bright lightning flash illuminates the ocean surface and ship deck, revealing stormy sea conditions

agents.ego_description: continuing to pilot the vessel as lightning briefly reveals the surrounding ocean

entered.detail: choppy dark water illuminated by the lightning flash
white foam on wave peaks visible during the bright flash

segments.scene_description: A sudden lightning strike bathes the scene in brilliant white light, momentarily revealing the turbulent ocean surface and wave crests surrounding the vessel before the flash subsides.

agents.ego_description: maintaining course through the darkness after the lightning flash passes

segments.scene_description: The scene returns to darkness as the lightning fades, with only the ship's structure and navigation monitors remaining visible while the vessel continues its steady forward motion through the night.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from a ship's bridge as a pitch-black night is momentarily shattered by a brilliant flash of lightning. It begins with a view of the vessel's bow extending into the darkness, illuminated only by the artificial glow of overhead navigation monitors and running lights. As the ship moves steadily forward, a sudden lightning strike bathes the entire scene in brilliant white light, momentarily revealing the turbulent ocean surface and crashing wave crests surrounding the hull. The scene then shifts back into deep shadow as the flash subsides, leaving only the ship's structure and glowing displays visible against the void. The camera continues its forward trajectory, returning to the rhythmic darkness of the stormy night.
